message:
test(spatial-hit-index): add 9 unit tests for spatial hit index

Cover z-order with three overlapping widgets, readonly vs mutable
hit_test consistency, single-pixel widgets, clear-on-empty
idempotency, register-remove-register cycles, non-overlapping
invalidation, hit_entry_contains, and reset_stats.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
